title: Base World Generation Pipeline Lifecycle
initialization_flow: STEP 1 [always]: _load_model() — abstract, must be implemented by subclass
STEP 3 [condition: NOT disable_guardrail AND NOT offload_guardrail_models]:
STEP 4 [condition: NOT offload_network]: _load_network() — no-op in base, overridden by subclass
STEP 5 [condition: NOT offload_tokenizer]: _load_tokenizer() — no-op in base, overridden by subclass

offload_methods.name: _offload_guardrail_models
offload_methods.action: del text_guardrail (if exists) → del video_guardrail (if exists) → gc.collect() → torch.cuda.empty_cache()

offload_methods.name: _offload_text_encoder_model
offload_methods.action: del text_encoder (if exists) → self.text_encoder=None → gc.collect() → torch.cuda.empty_cache()

lazy_load_with_offload_pattern.flow: IF offload_guardrail_models → _load_text_guardrail() | _run_guardrail_on_prompt(prompt) | IF offload_guardrail_models → _offload_guardrail_models() | return is_safe: bool
IF offload_guardrail_models → _load_video_guardrail() | _run_guardrail_on_video(video) | IF offload_guardrail_models → _offload_guardrail_models() | return video: np.ndarray | None

IF offload_text_encoder_model → _load_text_encoder_model() | _run_text_embedding_on_prompt(prompts) → loops prompts → text_encoder.encode_prompts([prompt]) | IF offload_text_encoder_model → _offload_text_encoder_model() | return (embeddings, masks)
Abstract (pass) — subclass must implement load-run-offload cycle for main model

key_conditions_summary.skip_all_guardrails: disable_guardrail=True OR offload_guardrail_models=True → deferred to with_offload methods

important_notes: BaseWorldGenerationPipeline is an ABC; _load_model() is always called first (unconditionally) and is the only mandatory subclass method called in __init__. All other components are conditionally loaded based on offload/disable flags. The 'with_offload' variants implement a lazy load→use→unload pattern for each component to minimize GPU memory footprint. gc.collect() + torch.cuda.empty_cache() are called after every offload operation.
